core_features.description: Clone any voice from just 3 seconds of audio. Supports uploading clips, recording from microphone, or capturing system audio (including from YouTube videos). All processing runs locally.
core_features.hermes_gap: Hermes has no native voice cloning capability

core_features.description: 5 TTS engines: Qwen3-TTS, LuxTTS, Chatterbox Multilingual, Chatterbox Turbo, HumeAI TADA. Users can choose the right model for each job.
Supports 23 languages including English, Arabic, Japanese, Hindi, Swahili, and more.
Pitch shifting, reverb, delay, chorus, compression, and filters built-in
Compose multi-voice projects with timeline editing. Infinite length via automatic chunking and crossfading.
core_features.hermes_gap: No multi-voice content creation in Hermes

core_features.description: All models and voice data stay on the user's machine. No cloud dependency.
core_features.hermes_gap: Hermes relies on cloud TTS services

advantages: Voicebox provides local voice cloning, Hermes has none
Voicebox is completely free and open source
Multi-engine flexibility for different use cases
Desktop app with GUI, easier for non-technical users
disadvantages: Hermes is an AI agent framework, Voicebox is only TTS
inspired_takeaways: Consider integrating open-source TTS engines (Coqui, XTTS) for local voice cloning
Multi-engine TTS architecture could allow users to choose quality vs speed
Local privacy-first approach for voice data could be a differentiator

key_findings: jamiepine/voicebox is a rising open-source project (~19k stars, +894/day) providing local voice cloning as ElevenLabs alternative
Meta's original Voicebox (2023) was a research model, never open-sourced - different project entirely
Voicebox targets creators/producers, not developers - different market from Hermes

action_items.action: Monitor voice cloning open-source space - XTTS, Coqui TTS, and Voicebox are all gaining traction
action_items.reason: Voice cloning becoming commoditized could impact cloud TTS services

action_items.action: Consider optional local TTS engine integration for privacy-sensitive use cases
action_items.reason: User demand for offline voice processing may grow
